failure.message:
Multiple failures or warnings in test: 1) Recipe 'EridaBotanicalSeedDnaDisk' is dynamic on a lathe but cannot be unlocked by research. Assert.That(unlockedTechs, Does.Contain(recipe)) Expected: some item equal to EridaBotanicalSeedDnaDisk But was: < FatExtractorMachineCircuitboard, FreezerElectronics, BiofabricatorMachineCircuitboard, BiomassReclaimerMachineCircuitboard, MicrowaveMachineCircuitboard, ReagentGrinderMachineCircuitboard, ElectricGrillMachineCircuitboard, APECircuitboard, AnomalyVesselCircuitboard, HonkerHarness... >
